query: Skydance Sports Jason Kelce documentary Prime Video Skydance Sports launch details

mako.raw:
{"query":"Skydance Sports Jason Kelce documentary Prime Video Skydance Sports launch details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1738,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://skydance.com/news/jason-kelce-documentary-kelce-examining-eagles-team-captains-2022-23-season-unveils-prime-video-premiere-date/","title":"Jason Kelce Documentary ‘Kelce’ Examining Eagles Team Captain’s 2022-23 Season Unveils Prime Video Premiere Date - Skydance Media","content":"Amazon and Skydance on Monday unveiled Kelce, a documentary focused on Philadelphia Eagles team captain and All-Pro center Jason Kelce, which will premiere on Prime Video September 12th.
After deciding to return for his 12th NFL season, Kelce embarked on a remarkable journey, highlighted by the arrival of his third daughter; the debut of his chart-topping podcast New Heights, which he co-hosts with his brother, Kansas City Chiefs All-Pro tight end Travis Kelce; and a history-making Super Bowl appearance that placed the entire Kelce family at the center of the sports world.
Kelce came to the Eagles in 2011, after being drafted in the sixth round.
Said Prime Video’s Head of Original Sports Content Matt Newman, “Jason Kelce has established himself as one of the most compelling and influential characters in sports, both on and off the field."},{"url":"http://press.amazonmgmstudios.com/us/en/press-release/prime-video-announces-september-12-premiere-date-f","title":"Prime Video Announces September 12 Premiere Date for Kelce","content":"The documentary will premiere September 12 exclusively on Prime Video, just ahead of the return of Thursday Night Football, which kicks off exclusively on Prime Video with the Minnesota Vikings visiting Kelce’s Eagles on Thursday, September 14.
But as the season came to a close, Kelce was still left grappling with what life looks like after he moves on from the game he loves, and if this hungry dog has one more run in him.
Kelce is executive produced by Connor Barwin; David Ellison, Jesse Sisgold, and Jon Weinbach of Skydance Sports; and Ross Ketover, Pat Kelleher, and Keith Cossrow of NFL Films."},{"url":"https://skydance.com/sport/kelce/","title":"Kelce - Skydance Media","content":"Presented by Prime Video Sports and Skydance Sports, Kelce is produced by 9.14 Pictures, Vera Y Productions, and NFL Films.
Kelce debuted in 2023 on Prime Video as the #1 documentary feature in the U.S. for the streamer."},{"url":"https://skydance.com/sports/","title":"Sports - Skydance Media","content":"Launched in 2021, Skydance Sports has quickly become the preeminent studio for leagues, teams, elite athletes and A-List Hollywood talent seeking to produce premium, sports-related entertainment."},{"url":"https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/entertainment/jason-kelce-documentary-prime-video","title":"Watch: Jason Kelce documentary on Prime Video","content":"How to watch Prime Video's ‘Kelce'—the intimate documentary that follows Jason Kelce’s 2022 football season
The feature-length film chronicles the former Philadelphia Eagles team captain and All-Pro center's 2022 season.
In April, Prime Video received 13 nominations for the 45th annual Sports Emmy Awards—two of which were for Kelce.
Prime Video is included with an Amazon Prime membership, priced at $14.99 per month or $139 annually.
If you are still contemplating whether a Prime membership aligns with your needs, you can also make use of the free trial."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Skydance Sports Jason Kelce documentary Prime Video Skydance Sports launch details","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"http://press.amazonmgmstudios.com/us/en/press-release/prime-video-announces-september-12-premiere-date-f","title":"Prime Video Announces September 12 Premiere Date for Kelce","content":"*The feature-length documentary follows Philadelphia Eagles team captain and All-Pro center Jason Kelce throughout the 2022-23 season*. NEW YORK—August 14—Today, Prime Video announced a greenlight order for *Kelce*, a feature-length documentary that follows Philadelphia Eagles team captain and All-Pro center Jason Kelce throughout the 2022-23 season. The documentarywill premiere September 12 exclusively on Prime Video, just ahead of the return of *Thursday Night Football*, which kicks off exclusively on Prime Video with the Minnesota Vikings visiting Kelce’s Eagles on Thursday, September 14. *Kelce* is an intimate and emotional feature-length documentary that chronicles Philadelphia Eagles team captain and All-Pro center Jason Kelce’s 2022-23 season, which began with him confronting one of the most challenging decisions any professional athlete will ever face—is now the time to hang it up? “We’re privileged to partner with Skydance Sports, 9.14 Pictures, Vera Y Productions, and NFL Films on this project, which welcomes fans into the psyche of one of the greatest centers in the history of the league for what is arguably the wildest and most eventful season of his illustrious career.”.","score":0.8215175,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://skydance.com/sport/kelce","title":"Kelce - Skydance Media","content":"Presented by Prime Video Sports and Skydance Sports, Kelce debuted in 2023 on Prime Video as the #1 documentary feature in the U.S. for the","score":0.783542,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://skydance.com/news/jason-kelce-documentary-kelce-examining-eagles-team-captains-2022-23-season-unveils-prime-video-premiere-date","title":"Jason Kelce Documentary 'Kelce' Examining Eagles Team ...","content":"Jason Kelce Documentary 'Kelce' Examining Eagles Team Captain's 2022-23 Season Unveils Prime Video Premiere Date. Deadline. August 14, 2023.","score":0.7795405,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pei1JCtKO0I","title":"Skydance Sports | Kelce | Bedtime Story","content":"Presented by Prime Video Sports and Skydance Sports, Kelce debuted in 2023 on Prime Video as the #1 documentary feature in the U.S. for the","score":0.74161834,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.delawareonline.com/story/sports/nfl/2023/09/11/philadelphia-eagles-jason-kelces-documentary-premieres-monday-sept-11-amazon-prime-how-to-watch/70822375007","title":"Philadelphia Eagles star Jason Kelce has Amazon Prime ...","content":"Jason Kelce, of the Philadelphia Eagles, has a new documentary releasing on Amazon Prime on Sept. 12. is presented by Prime Video and Skydance","score":0.7293082,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.74,"request_id":"7abb151d-65b1-438f-b907-6785fd42ec91"}
